name: @orbitalfoundation/site
description: The orbital site: the client-side web experience (Svelte 5, slash-routed, data-forward) together with the instance arrangement — config, namespace seeds, and deploy scripts. Formerly orbital-jam.

scripts.test:all: npm test --prefix ../orbital-filespace && npm test --prefix ../orbital-streams && npm test --prefix ../orbital-store && npm test --prefix ../orbital-server && npm test --prefix ../orbital-headless && npm test
